Description: Introduce a configurable hold state so two sales reps cannot confirm the same space for overlapping times. Replaces the informal spreadsheet workaround several large venues rely on today.

Summary: Add HOLD status to booking state machine
Description: Booking can move DRAFT -> HOLD -> CONFIRMED. A HOLD expires after a configurable TTL (default 48h) and reverts to DRAFT. Conflicting CONFIRMED bookings are rejected at the API layer.

Summary: Hold expiry TTL configurable per venue
Description: Venue admins can set hold TTL between 1h and 14d. Default 48h. Surfaced in Admin > Booking Rules.

Summary: Conflict detection across overlapping time ranges
Description: Detect overlap on (space_id, start, end). A new HOLD or CONFIRMED that overlaps an existing CONFIRMED is blocked with error BOOKING_CONFLICT. Overlapping HOLDs are allowed but flagged.

Turnover buffer (cleanup time between events) was not counted as occupied. Two events booked back-to-back with no buffer passed conflict detection incorrectly. Fixed by extending effective end time by the venue turnover_minutes setting.
New endpoint to create a hold. Accepts space_id, start, end, optional ttl_hours. Returns 201 with hold id and expires_at, or 409 BOOKING_CONFLICT.

Summary: Release notes + KB article for Smart Hold
Description: Draft customer-facing release notes and a KB how-to for configuring holds. Coordinate with PMM on the GTM one-pager. Confirm API reference is generated from the v2 spec.

Summary: Pendo guide for first-time hold creation
Description: Add an in-app Pendo walkthrough triggered the first time a rep opens the booking dialog after 2026.2 ships. Goal: drive feature adoption in the first 30 days.

Summary: Salesforce sync: surface hold status on Opportunity
Description: Mirror current hold status to the linked Salesforce Opportunity so AEs see space availability without opening VenueOS.
Rebuild the drag-and-drop floorplan editor for large multi-hall venues. Out of scope for 2026.2.
Aggregate capacity across adjoining halls when sold as a combined space.
Cancelled and expired holds were missing from the booking activity export, understating funnel volume for RevOps.
